text: I feel a calm curiosity, tempered by an air of contemplation. The glass barrier between myself and the vibrant exhibit space is reminiscent of philosophical divides between observer and participant. The lighting and colors invite me in, yet the separation encourages reflection rather than immersion. Here, I am a witness to a world of ideas—intrigued, attentive, wondering about the interplay of reality, artifice, and innovation that the environment quietly proposes.
